title: Add localStorage Schema Versioning
summary: Add a version field to localStorage data. On schema change, migrate or reset gracefully instead of silent corruption.

tasks.description: Add SCHEMA_VERSION constant. When loading progress, check version field. If missing or outdated, reset gracefully. Save version with every write.
acceptance_criteria: Loading data without a version field resets gracefully (no crash)
Loading data with current version works normally
Future schema changes can bump SCHEMA_VERSION to trigger migration

testing_focus: Load game with old data (no version)
Load game with current version data
